use_cases: Display colorful rainbow text for headings and hero sections
Create gradient text effects for branding and visual emphasis
Add decorative typography with responsive mobile adaptation
Enhance visual appeal of text elements with multi-color shadow effects
Display italicized brand names or promotional text with dynamic color gradients
ai_summary: A rainbow text effect component that renders colorful gradient text using CSS text-shadow for desktop and linear gradient backgrounds for mobile. Features italic Open Sans typography at variable font sizes with responsive behavior that adapts styling based on screen width detection.
